modules.role: Core backtest execution engine — runs trades against historical price series
modules.pitRisk: MEDIUM — uses date-based price queries; needs explicit PIT gate verification
modules.notes: Provides BacktestConfig / TradeResult interfaces. Not currently wired to active scoring corpus.

modules.role: Walk-forward validation: splits history into train/test windows, computes hitRate / stability
modules.pitRisk: MEDIUM — must verify that test windows use only data from before test period end
modules.notes: WalkForwardResult has excessReturn / hitRate. Not contaminating scoring input.

modules.role: PIT-safe ledger replay — replays portfolio decisions using historical data with strict asOf gating
modules.notes: Key replay engine with PIT gate already enforced.

modules.role: Resolves entry price (PIT-safe: date <= asOfDate) and outcome price (date <= outcomeDate) for horizon evaluation
modules.pitRisk: LOW — explicitly separates entry (PIT-safe) from outcome (post-asOf)
modules.notes: outcomePrice / returnPctByHorizon / realizedReturnClass are outcome-only. Must never feed back into scoring input.

modules.role: Accumulates simulation snapshots into the simulation corpus
modules.notes: simulation_snapshot_corpus.jsonl: 60 entries, 2 symbols (2330, 2317 or similar), 10 dates, qualityStatus=BLOCKED.

modules.role: Builds replay simulation snapshots for the simulation corpus
Builds ledger replay datasets from shadow prediction log
Selects candidates for outcome backfill (shadow log entries ready for outcome resolution)
modules.pitRisk: LOW — outcome is post-asOf by design
modules.notes: Outcome data flows OUT of here, not into scoring.

modules.role: Autonomous simulation engine with wall-clock override and future-quote leakage prevention
modules.pitRisk: MEDIUM — has simulationDate override; leakage guard exists but not formally audited
modules.notes: Part of autonomous path which has known timezone/double-execution issues (P27 audit flagged). Do not use in P29C paper contract directly.

modules.role: Frozen simulation corpus — 60 entries, 2 symbols, 10 asOfDates
modules.notes: qualityStatus field absent from rows; corpusVersion=sim-corpus-v0; labeled BLOCKED in roadmap (coverageRatio 0.2333).

knownGaps: No unified simulation contract document exists yet (P29C creates it)
BacktestRunner is not wired to PIT feature registry
WalkForwardEngine test windows not verified against PIT registry
SimulationExecutionEngine has autonomous-path risks (timezone, double execution)
simulation_snapshot_corpus has only 2 symbols — not optimizer-ready
No outcome isolation contract exists (P29C creates it)
disclaimer: Landscape review only. Not investment advice.
